import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { ArrowLeft, Copy, CheckCheck, FileText, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react'; import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card'; import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'; import { Alert, AlertDescription } from '@/components/ui/alert'; const HowToDraftPleadingsPage = () => { const [copiedStates, setCopiedStates] = useState({}); const handleNavigateBack = () => { // Simple navigation handler - you can customize this based on your needs window.history.back(); }; const handleCopy = async (text, id) => { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text); setCopiedStates(prev => ({ ...prev, [id]: true })); setTimeout(() => { setCopiedStates(prev => ({ ...prev, [id]: false })); }, 2000); }; const CopyBox = ({ text, id }) => ( 
{text}
); const ImageSection = ({ title, description }) => (

{description}

); return (

How to Draft Pleadings

Comprehensive guide for drafting effective legal pleadings

{/* Template Sections */}

1 Basic Templates

{/* Writing Guidelines */}

Essential Writing Guidelines

When drafting pleadings, maintain clear and concise language while following these essential guidelines:

  • Use precise legal terminology appropriate for your jurisdiction
  • Structure arguments logically with clear paragraph breaks
  • Include all necessary legal citations in proper format
  • Proofread carefully for accuracy and clarity
{/* Example Images */}

Format Examples

{/* Common Sections */}

Common Pleading Sections

{/* Additional Templates */}

Specialized Templates

{/* Best Practices */}

Best Practices

Always verify local court rules and formatting requirements before filing.

Document Organization

Maintain consistent formatting throughout your document. Use clear headings, proper spacing, and appropriate margins according to court requirements.

Citation Format

Follow proper Bluebook citation format for all legal references. Double-check citations for accuracy and completeness.

{/* Final Tips */}

Final Tips
); }; export default HowToDraftPleadingsPage;
